content: 查询当前超警戒水位的站点。
我来查询当前超警戒水位的站点。

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# 先检查数据新鲜度
with conn.cursor() as cur:
    cur.execute("SELECT MAX(tm) FROM sl323.st_river_r")
    latest = cur.fetchone()[0]
    print(f"数据最新时间: {latest}")

# 查询超警戒水位站点
sql = """
SELECT 
    r.stcd,
    r.tm,
    r.z AS current_z,
    rv.WRZ,
    rv.GRZ,
    ROUND(r.z - rv.WRZ, 3) AS exceed_wrz,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.z > rv.GRZ THEN '红色预警 (超保证)'
        WHEN r.z > rv.WRZ THEN '黄色预警 (超警戒)'
    END AS warning_level
FROM sl323.st_river_r r
INNER JOIN sl323.st_rvfcch_b rv ON r.stcd = rv.STCD
WHERE r.z > rv.WRZ
  AND r.tm = (SELECT MAX(tm) FROM sl323.st_river_r r2 WHERE r2.stcd = r.stcd)
ORDER BY (r.z - rv.WRZ) DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    results = cur.fetchall()

conn.close()

print(f"\n超警戒水位站点共 {len(results)} 个：\n")
if results:
    for row in results:
        print(f"  站点: {row['stcd']}  |  当前水位: {row['current_z']}m  |  警戒水位: {row['wrz']}m  |  保证水位: {row['grz']}m  |  超出警戒: {row['exceed_wrz']}m  |  {row['warning_level']}  |  时间: {row['tm']}")
else:
    print("  暂无超警戒水位站点。")"}

查询超时了，子查询可能比较慢。我来优化SQL，去掉相关子查询，用更高效的方式获取最新数据。

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=60
)

# 优化：先取出每个站点的最新水位，再JOIN防洪指标
sql = """
SELECT 
    r.stcd,
    r.tm,
    r.z AS current_z,
    rv.WRZ,
    rv.GRZ,
    ROUND(r.z - rv.WRZ, 3) AS exceed_wrz,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.z > rv.GRZ THEN '红色预警 (超保证)'
        WHEN r.z > rv.WRZ THEN '黄色预警 (超警戒)'
    END AS warning_level
FROM sl323.st_river_r r
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT stcd, MAX(tm) AS max_tm 
    FROM sl323.st_river_r 
    GROUP BY stcd
) latest ON r.stcd = latest.stcd AND r.tm = latest.max_tm
INNER JOIN sl323.st_rvfcch_b rv ON r.stcd = rv.STCD
WHERE r.z > rv.WRZ
ORDER BY (r.z - rv.WRZ) DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    results = cur.fetchall()

conn.close()

print(f"超警戒水位站点共 {len(results)} 个：\n")
if results:
    for row in results:
        print(f"  站点: {row['stcd']}  |  当前水位: {row['current_z']}m  |  警戒水位: {row['wrz']}m  |  保证水位: {row['grz']}m  |  超出警戒: {row['exceed_wrz']}m  |  {row['warning_level']}  |  时间: {row['tm']}")
else:
    print("  暂无超警戒水位站点。")"}

查询到了17个站点，只是列名大小写有问题。让我修正输出：

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=60
)

sql = """
SELECT 
    r.stcd,
    r.tm,
    r.z AS current_z,
    rv.WRZ,
    rv.GRZ,
    ROUND(r.z - rv.WRZ, 3) AS exceed_wrz,
    CASE 
        WHEN r.z > rv.GRZ THEN '红色预警 (超保证)'
        WHEN r.z > rv.WRZ THEN '黄色预警 (超警戒)'
    END AS warning_level
FROM sl323.st_river_r r
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT stcd, MAX(tm) AS max_tm 
    FROM sl323.st_river_r 
    GROUP BY stcd
) latest ON r.stcd = latest.stcd AND r.tm = latest.max_tm
INNER JOIN sl323.st_rvfcch_b rv ON r.stcd = rv.STCD
WHERE r.z > rv.WRZ
ORDER BY (r.z - rv.WRZ) DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    results = cur.fetchall()

conn.close()

# 打印列名调试
if results:
    print(f"列名: {list(results[0].keys())}\n")

print(f"超警戒水位站点共 {len(results)} 个：\n")
print(f"{'站点':<12} {'当前水位(m)':<14} {'警戒水位(m)':<14} {'保证水位(m)':<14} {'超出警戒(m)':<12} {'预警等级':<20} {'时间'}")
print("-" * 120)
if results:
    for row in results:
        keys = list(row.keys())
        stcd = row.get('stcd', '')
        current_z = row.get('current_z', '')
        wrz = row.get('WRZ', row.get('wrz', ''))
        grz = row.get('GRZ', row.get('grz', ''))
        exceed = row.get('exceed_wrz', '')
        level = row.get('warning_level', '')
        tm = row.get('tm', '')
        print(f"{stcd:<12} {str(current_z):<14} {str(wrz):<14} {str(grz):<14} {str(exceed):<12} {str(level):<20} {tm}")
else:
    print("  暂无超警戒水位站点。")

# 统计
red = sum(1 for r in results if r.get('warning_level','').startswith('红色'))
yellow = len(results) - red
print(f"\n汇总: 红色预警 {red} 个, 黄色预警 {yellow} 个")"}
